description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with two broad, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its upper and middle sections. The surface of the cone appears to be made of flexible plastic or rubber, while the base is thicker, darker, and likely weighted for added stability. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the surface. The object appears clean and in new or lightly used condition, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, sturdy black base. The cone is clean, undamaged, and designed for high visibility and stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the orange cone, both white stripes, and the square black base.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features, highlighting the cone's symmetry and the base's thickness.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 1, showing the cone's smooth surface and reflective stripes.
description_view_3: Rear view, again displaying the two white stripes and the robust, textured base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, thick, and black, likely made of heavy rubber for stability, with a slightly textured surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: New or lightly used, with no visible wear, dirt, or damage.
